programmes.show_description: Broken Heart In Broken Arrow. Twenty-one-year-old mother, Lauren Kidd, always follows her heart. It leads her to happiness, but there's a darkness lurking that no one can stop. S7, Ep15
The Man Who Got Away. In Georgia, Heather Strube looks forward to a bright future with her new boyfriend. But one day, a routine trip to the shopping centre shatters everything. S7, Ep16
Seeing Red. At the scene of a traffic accident a teen is dead at the wheel of her car. An autopsy reveals a sinister crime - will CCTV footage find her killer? S7, Ep15
I Loved My Daughter. In Texas, the bodies of two women lie behind a grocery store. Police turn to surveillance footage, hoping to discover who killed them - and why. S7, Ep16

Deadly Target. A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head and the weapon lying nearby. Experts try to determine who fired the gun. S1, Ep16
Seeds of Destruction. See how plants help provide oxygen and nutrients, but in a criminal investigation, they can also mark the time and location of a person's death. S2, Ep4
Backstage Murder. Years after a successful TV producer is gunned down in his New York office, a tip leads the FBI to a murderous entertainment industry giant. S3, Ep13
Under Fire. An armoured car robbery leaves a guard dead and another critically wounded. Learn how the FBI tracks domestic terrorists through the underworld. S3, Ep14
Julie Archer And Operation Bloodstone. Judge Rinder explores the story of a woman who was set on fire and a series of thefts of laughing gas canisters from hospitals. S3, Ep1
Four Weddings And A Funeral. After four marriages, 36-year-old Carol Grannon returned to school and got a lucrative job. But, one of her men ended her life as this new chapter began. S3, Ep5
Navajo Nightmare. Pepita Redhair, a 27-year-old Navajo woman, goes missing in Albuquerque, New Mexico. The family enlists the help of a medicine man to find her. S10, Ep2
Vanished From Campus. Student Christian Aguilar mysteriously vanishes from his university campus. Police are stumped until CCTV footage takes the case in a shocking new direction. S2, Ep2
Andrew Scanlan: Murder In The Woods. Andrew Scanlan's body was found in a woods, weeks after he was reported missing in 2006. Detectives recount how they found the murderer. S1, Ep2
Angels And Demons. Alessia Mesquita falls in love with Rashod Newton. But Rashod's unpredictable behaviour forces Alessia to make a decision that will have deadly consequences. S9, Ep8
Why You Recording Me? Behind closed doors, India Mackey's relationship with her boyfriend is painful. A day after her 20th birthday, India learns what he is truly capable of. S9, Ep9

programmes.show_name: American Detective With Lt Joe Kenda
programmes.show_description: Black Water. In Pennsylvania, the body of a computer programmer is found submerged in a bathtub. Leads are scarce until detectives uncover a series of troubling voicemails. S1, Ep9
Birmingham Shooting And Shoe Detective. Judge Rinder examines a shooting that left two young girls fighting for their lives and a criminal who left behind a clue to his identity. S3, Ep2
Where's Mom? A loving wife and mother is found brutally murdered at home in Edmond, Oklahoma. Can security camera footage help detectives hunt down her killer? S6, Ep2
On The Edge. A violent suspect holds an innocent woman at knifepoint, officers embark on a high-speed chase, and deputies fight to save a man clinging to a cliff. S6, Ep8
License To Rage. A rageful driver crashes into a building. New Jersey drivers try to survive their commute. An angry man picks a fight with a scooter. S2, Ep5
Parkway Pariahs. Truckers fight off angry drivers. A boy fights for his life against an enraged motorist. A furious woman chases down another driver. S2, Ep6
Julie Archer And Operation Bloodstone. Judge Rinder explores the story of a woman who was set on fire and a series of thefts of laughing gas canisters from hospitals. S3, Ep1
Life On The Lake. Gil and his family are living an idyllic existence until an accident changes everything. Just as Gill seems to have moved on, someone close hatches a deadly plot. S7, Ep17
Safe At Home. After years of searching for love, Doris thinks she's finally hit the jackpot with an old friend named Mark. But something dark is taking hold of their marriage. S7, Ep18
The White Cellphone. In 2014, graduate student Tequila Suter is stabbed to death in her suburban Buffalo home. Investigators piece together a video trail of her murder. S7, Ep17
He's Dead, That's How I Feel. A bizarre traffic accident takes the life of a teenager. With the driver vanished, police turn to surveillance video and make a sinister discovery. S7, Ep18

From the Ashes. See how arson investigators gather physical evidence and mount undercover and sting operations to crack insurance torchings and arson murders. S2, Ep9
Lasting Impressions. No matter how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit often leaves something behind. Even a fingerprint or shoe tread can lead to a conviction. S3, Ep3
Manhunt. The prime suspect in a murder is caught robbing a bank before being sentenced to life. His subsequent prison escape leads to a huge FBI manhunt. S3, Ep15
No Remorse. Explore the mystery behind the body of a drug courier found burning in an alley. The FBI capture a drug lord who uses violence to keep people quiet. S3, Ep17
Birmingham Shooting And Shoe Detective. Judge Rinder examines a shooting that left two young girls fighting for their lives and a criminal who left behind a clue to his identity. S3, Ep2
Two's Company, Three Is Murder. Linda Singleton's life seemed perfect. But under the veneer she was engaged in a love triangle that turned deadly when her secret affair was exposed. S3, Ep6
Disappearance In The Desert. Daniel Robinson arrives at his work site in the Arizona desert. A co-worker claims he was acting strangely before leaving in the middle of his shift. S10, Ep3
Good Samaritan. Student Kenia Monge disappears without a trace. The search hits dead ends until detectives uncover chilling surveillance footage, revealing what happened to her. S2, Ep4
Steve Wright: The Suffolk Strangler. Detectives recount the investigation into the serial killer Steve Wright. How did they catch the notorious murderer who killed five women? S1, Ep3
I Saw Dad Kill Mom. Five-year-old Audrey witnesses her mother, Diane, brutally stabbed to death. To Audrey's horror, her mother's murderer is somebody very close to home. S10, Ep3
Tempest. After a violent knife attack results in a man's death, his wife claims she was the victim of an abusive relationship. His phone will reveal the truth. S10, Ep5

programmes.show_name: American Detective With Lt Joe Kenda
programmes.show_description: Crimson Snow. In California, police find an accomplished U.S. Forest Service worker beneath a mound of snow. A multi-state manhunt for a deranged killer ensues. S3, Ep6
Double Tragedy And Grace Banks. Judge Rinder examines the murder case of a girl whose younger sister was also dying of terminal cancer. Then, he looks into a gang of puppy traders. S3, Ep3
Cold Feet. A 24-year-old Yale student goes missing several days before her wedding. Can security camera footage help detectives hunt down the person responsible? S6, Ep4
Jimmy Haakenson. Detective Jason Moran re-opens the case of serial killer John Wayne Gacy. The grieving family of Jimmy Haakenson, missing for 40 years, wonder if he was a victim. S1, Ep3
Sex House Homicide. When police discover a married man dead in a secret sex den, they launch a relentless hunt for his killer, unearthing dark secrets along the way. S9, Ep1
